warps.notes: West door tile — exits to Ecruteak City east gate
West door tile (lower) — exits to Ecruteak City east gate
East door tile — exits to Route 42 west edge (tile x=0 y=8)
East door tile (lower) — exits to Route 42 west edge (tile x=0 y=9)

tile_layout.notes: Standard two-door gate layout. Officer NPC stands near center (x=5 y=4). Exit mats (E) mark both door thresholds. The building is a thin east-west corridor with windows along the north interior wall. No counters or special features beyond the officer NPC.

npcs.name: Officer
npcs.dialogue_summary: Warns the player about Mt. Mortar: 'MT.MORTAR is like a maze inside. Be careful. Don't get lost in there.'

notes: Standard route gate building connecting Ecruteak City (west) to Route 42 (east). No special events or items. The sole NPC is an Officer who warns about Mt. Mortar's maze-like interior. Map attribute: no connections (0), tileset $00. This gate is the only way to pass between Ecruteak City and Route 42 — the route's western warp tiles at x=0 y=8-9 lead here, and this building's east warps return to Route 42.
